queries.feature_definition: Checking account status: no checking account.
queries.question: Empirical analysis of the statistical impact of having no checking account on increasing credit default probability.

queries.feature_definition: Savings account status: savings below 100 DM.
queries.question: Investigation into the relationship between savings balances below 100 DM and decreasing credit risk exposure.

queries.feature_definition: Credit history: critical account or other existing credits.
queries.question: Assessment of the association between critical account or other existing credits and reduced likelihood of default.
